title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 162.756 - Transportation by common carriers for students of schools for the blind and deaf
text:
162.756.  Transportation by common carriers for students of schools for the blind and deaf. — The state board of education may pay the travel costs, by common carrier or otherwise, for students of the school for the blind or the school for the deaf, as the case may be, when such students are traveling between their homes and those institutions.
(L. 1985 S.B. 389 § 1)
